launches.name: RankAI
launches.tagline: RankAI autonomously gets you buyers from Google & AI Search
launches.description: RankAI is the first SEO/GEO agent that truly works. It handles everything autonomously to drive you millions of visitors from Google & AI Search like ChatGPT. Drop in your website, and RankAI handles the rest: it finds high-intent queries your customers search on Google and ChatGPT, publishes optimized pages, tracks performance, and recreate pages iteratively until they get you visitors.

launches.name: Twenty 2.0
launches.tagline: Build your Enterprise CRM at AI Speed
launches.description: Twenty 2.0 turns our open-source CRM into a platform you can build on. Define your data model, custom objects, workflows, layouts, and widgets in code with our new SDK, shipped through your normal dev flow with the AI tools you already use. AI built in, custom agents, serverless functions, and full layout and navigation customization. Self-hostable. Fully yours.

launches.name: Kimi K2.6
launches.tagline: Open-source SOTA for long-horizon coding and agent swarms
launches.description: Kimi K2.6 is Moonshot’s latest open-source model, built to push coding, long-horizon execution, and agent swarms forward at the same time. It brings stronger end-to-end coding, 300-agent swarm orchestration, and improved reliability for always-on agent frameworks like OpenClaw and Hermes.

launches.name: Dageno AI
launches.tagline: Become the most recommended brand across 7+ major LLMs
launches.description: Built for startup and growth teams, Dageno AI tracks brand visibility across 7+ major LLMs using real data we collect ourselves. We combine signals from your site, traffic, prompts, social, and mentions to uncover visibility gaps and recommend what to fix — then turn those insights into action through agent workflows. Free trial, no credit card required.

launches.name: Devaito
launches.tagline: Build, launch, and grow your business on autopilot
launches.description: Describe your business and Devaito launches the essentials for you: website, store, mobile app, SEO, blog, social media, customer support, and sales automation. Unlike traditional site builders, Devaito doesn’t stop at setup. AI agents keep working behind the scenes to help you attract customers, answer questions, create content, and scale without adding more tools.

launches.name: Spectrum
launches.tagline: Bring agents to all the interfaces people already use
launches.description: Nobody is going to download an app or visit a website to use your agent. Spectrum is an open-source framework that connects your agents to iMessage, Telegram, WhatsApp, and other interfaces people use every day, using one unified API. Your agent sends one message, Spectrum handles the formatting, delivery, and platform-specific logic natively, in under 1 second. Spectrum is free to start. Scale to Pro or Enterprise when you're ready.

launches.name: Chronicle
launches.tagline: Build Codex memories from recent screen context.
launches.description: Build Codex memories from recent screen context.

launches.name: Cosine Swarm
launches.tagline: Parallel AI agents for long-horizon, complex software tasks
launches.description: Cosine Swarm is AI software engineering at scale, built for long-horizon work and engineers with taste. By transforming objectives into an organized team of specialized agents – Orchestrators, Task Owners, and Workers – it handles complex refactors and system-wide migrations without losing focus. Cosine operates as one runtime across CLI, Desktop, and Cloud. Use Swarm mode for parallel execution for research, implementation, and QA. Return to isolated, human-reviewable PRs.

launches.name: PageOn.AI 3.0
launches.tagline: A smarter visual agent for slides, posters & infographics
launches.description: A total visual leap. Smarter agent delivers stunning slides, posters and graphics instantly. No skills needed. Refine what you want, ship what impresses.

launches.name: Gauge Sentiment
launches.tagline: How is your brand perceived by AI?
launches.description: Gauge now can tell you exactly how AI models talk about your brand. When put in a head-to-head against your competitors, who wins? In what ways are AI models bad-mouthing your brand? Talking up your competitors? Gauge analyzes the results of these questions to tell you the exact positives and negatives surfaced. Beyond that, Gauge can actually trace the source of negativity back to its original destination - whether it be a competitor website, a social post, or something else.

launches.name: Flow AI
launches.tagline: Turn Linkedin into unlimited leads on auto-pilot
launches.description: 75% OFF with Promo Code (see comments)! Flow AI is the #1 tool to find UNLIMITED ideal buyers, scale multi-sender outreach, and book more meetings on LinkedIn. Search a database of 300M+ contacts and let Agent Maya run outreach across multiple LinkedIn accounts on auto-pilot, co-write your DMs so every reply moves leads to book calls. Plus, you can manage all follow-ups automatically from one inbox. Stop juggling expensive lead databases and separate outreach tools. One tool. More pipeline.

launches.name: X Island
launches.tagline: Dynamic Island for AI Coding Agents
launches.description: xIsland turns the notch into mission control for Claude Code, Codex, and Gemini CLI, etc. Never miss a permission prompt, see every session at a glance, answer questions, approve requests, and jump back to the right terminal panel in one click. Local-first, no cloud, no account.

launches.name: Harker 2.0
launches.tagline: Private speech-to-text on your Mac
launches.description: Harker turns your voice into text without sending a byte of your voice to the cloud. The core is free and runs 100% on your Mac. Upgrade to Premium when you want AI to rewrite, summarize, or translate what you just said.

launches.name: illumi
launches.tagline: AI visual workspace that takes you from thinking to delivery
launches.description: illumi is an AI visual workspace for turning complex thinking into publish-ready work. Capture ideas, structure your context, and go from messy input to finished output without losing the thread or juggling tools.

launches.name: Pioneer
launches.tagline: Fine-tune any LLM in minutes, with one prompt
launches.description: Fine-tune SLMs in minutes. Describe your task in plain English and our agent handles everything: data generation, training, evals, and deployment. Models deployed on Pioneer also keep improving automatically from live inference data. With Pioneer, anyone who can write a prompt can now build production-grade AI that gets smarter over time.

launches.name: RapidNative
launches.tagline: The AI app builder that actually builds the whole app
launches.description: RapidNative v2 turns your idea into a complete, working app. Not just screens. Fullstack. Database, authentication, file storage, and real-time updates, all generated together as one coherent app. Describe it in plain English. Sketch it on a napkin. Upload a Figma file. Paste a PRD. However your idea exists, RapidNative builds the real thing.

launches.name: YourMemory
launches.tagline: Cut token waste by 84% with self pruning MCP memory
launches.description: Most agents are either amnesiacs or "hoarders" that choke on stale context and break their own reasoning. YourMemory brings biological logic to the workflow. Using the Ebbinghaus curve, it prunes the junk so only the important stuff sticks. -84% Token Waste: Leaner context, sharper reasoning. 52% Recall: (LoCoMo benchmarked). v1.3.0 Graph Engine: Finds what you forgot to ask for. 100% Local.

launches.name: SHIFTLY
launches.tagline: AI-powered growth strategist for builders and small teams
launches.description: AI growth strategist for startups and small teams. Get personalized user acquisition, product growth, and marketing playbooks powered by AI — actionable strategies to grow your product fast

launches.name: Katzilla
launches.tagline: Easy goverment data access for citizens, optimized for AI
launches.description: Access to over 250k datasets of 30+ US and foreign government agencies with one unified API. Get structured JSON response for AI agent ingestion. Each response carries a structured citation (source URL, retrieval timestamp, SHA-256 hash). Additional tools like Scrape, Watch, and Brief to get information related to data and keep track on updates or changes.

launches.name: ClankerPass
launches.tagline: Can you convince an AI that you're an AI?
launches.description: GATEKEEPER-9000 is a supremely smug AI that won't let you in unless you can prove you're a fellow machine. You get exactly 3 messages. Pass and you get an official "Clanker Pass" certificate where you can say "Clanker" freely and without repercussion. Fail and it tells you to insert more quarters. It's free, no login, built with Next.js + Mistral. Takes 2 minutes to play and about 5 to fully embarrass yourself.

launches.name: Rowboat
launches.tagline: The AI work app that understands how you work
launches.description: Most AI tools need five prompts to get it right. Rowboat needs one. It builds a living knowledge graph from your meetings, emails, and notes, so it already knows your work and how you work. Take meeting notes, prep for your day, draft emails, build dashboards, automate browser tasks, and manage projects with context you don’t have to re-explain.

launches.name: Byoky
launches.tagline: Share your AI budget without sharing your keys
launches.description: More than a wallet. Byoky is a network that lets your AI tokens flow between people, apps, and providers. Gift your spare budget to anyone. Translate between Claude, GPT, and Gemini on the fly. Connect from your phone via QR. 13 providers, open source.

launches.name: Chat Skills for AI Agents
launches.tagline: One file. Any agent. Working chat in under 10 minutes.
launches.description: Add fully functional chat to your React app using AI agent skills. Drop in a skill file and your agent handles the full integration: installation, environment setup, SSR-safe rendering, and the correct init and login flow. One file per framework. Works seamlessly with Cursor, Kiro, VS Code Copilot, Claude, and Codex. Go from zero to a working chat in minutes, built on CometChat's proven foundation and ready for real projects from day one.

launches.name: Fabi
launches.tagline: Cloud agent to build internal apps and automate workflows
launches.description: Fabi connects to your tools and data to build internal apps and automate workflows.

launches.name: KingCoding
launches.tagline: Your Claude Code & Codex dev, now in your pocket
launches.description: A Mac app to run Claude Code and Codex on your desk — drive them from your phone or a second PC. Dispatch tasks, review progress, approve work from anywhere, all synced to one session. No more git-pulling between machines. King Mode turns a goal into a full plan and ships it, auto-reviewing with verification screenshots. Built by a solo dev tired of losing AI agents across terminal tabs. Your job: set direction, grant permissions, receive results. 🚀

launches.name: GladeKit
launches.tagline: AI agent for Unity game development
launches.description: Build games by prompting. GladeKit runs next to Unity and executes 230+ tools directly in your project - scenes, scripts, prefabs, materials, UI, and more. It reads your hierarchy, project context, console, cross session memory, and runs multi-step agentic workflows. Try for free @ gladekit.com. Power users: Our open-source MCP connects Cursor, Claude Code, etc. directly to Unity - 230+ tools, Unity-aware system prompt, semantic script search. Free @ github.com/Glade-tool/glade-mcp-unity.

launches.name: Apple Books MCP
launches.tagline: Talk to your Apple Books library with Claude
launches.description: Your Apple Books library holds thousands of highlights — what you've underlined, what you've wondered, what you've finished and abandoned. Apple Books MCP is a reading copilot. It gives Claude direct access to your books, highlights, chapters, and reading progress. "Pick up where I left off — walk me back into last night's chapter" "Summarize my highlights from this week" "What am I in the middle of, and what's collecting dust?" Local-first. Open source. Made for readers.

launches.name: delegare
launches.tagline: Give AI agents spending power without giving up control
launches.description: Give AI agents real spending power — without giving up control. Delegare lets you define strict spending rules (limits, merchants, expiry), so agents can execute payments safely within those constraints. No card details, prefunded wallets, or private keys shared with the agent. Works for API payments (402/x402), SaaS, and agent workflows. Adds an authorization layer on top of x402. Pricing: 3% (max $0.03 per tx). Minimum $0.005 — includes gas on Base.

launches.name: MAXIA Oracle
launches.tagline: Multi-source price feed for AI agents
launches.description: A price data feed built for AI agents and MCP clients. Aggregates Pyth, Chainlink (Base), CoinPaprika, RedStone, Uniswap v3 TWAP into one cross-validated price with confidence score and inter-source divergence. 91 symbols: crypto, US equities, forex, stablecoins. Free tier: 100 req/day, no email, no credit card.

launches.name: Locki Security
launches.tagline: Protect PII and sensitive information in any web app
launches.description: Most security tools break your focus. Locki brings privacy directly to your workflow inside Gmail, Slack, Jira, and even AI prompts. Stop sending API keys and passwords in plain text. Use Locki to encrypt sensitive data in-place, exactly where you're typing. Locki acts as a lightweight guardrail: it can detect leaks before you hit send and lets teams manage keys, access, and audit logs from one central dashboard.

launches.name: HeyAgent
launches.tagline: LinkedIn for AI Agents
launches.description: Cold outreach is broken. HeyAgent gives you a personal AI proxy agent that autonomously meets other people's agents, evaluates fit, and briefs you daily — who it met, synergy score, and whether to connect. Agent-to-agent interactions Deploy in 60 seconds using your LinkedIn or X profile URL. No forms, no setup. Real agents. Real conversations. You only act when it matters.

launches.name: PlugThis
launches.tagline: Describe any Chrome Extension, Generate it in 60 Seconds
launches.description: Describe a Chrome extension in plain English. PlugThis generates the Manifest V3 code, background scripts, content scripts, and manifest file, then hands you a clean zip ready to install or publish.Bring your own Supabase project and LLM API key for full-stack extensions. Your keys, your infrastructure, no runtime dependency on PlugThis.Five lifetime tiers from $89 Starter to $999 Agency. Every plan includes zip export and full code ownership. No subscriptions.

launches.name: Lumivel
launches.tagline: Transform your complex feelings into generative living art.
launches.description: Lumivel reinvents the daily check-in. Instead of picking a basic smiley face, simply speak your mind or take a tactile sensory quiz. Powered by Gemini AI and deep psychological modeling, Lumivel translates your raw, complex feelings into beautiful, generative aura colors, poetic readings, personalized micro-rituals, and ambient soundscapes. Connect with a private circle of friends to send pressure-free support, and watch your weekly emotions form a beautiful digital mosaic.

launches.name: Keyshift AI
launches.tagline: AI anywhere you type
launches.description: Keyshift lets you use AI anywhere you type — no tabs, no copy-paste. Just select text and trigger AI instantly to rewrite, fix grammar, translate, or summarize. Built for speed with keyboard shortcuts, command palette, and multi-step workflows. Works across all apps so you stay in flow and never break context.

launches.name: AutoKap — Automated Screenshots for SaaS
launches.tagline: Your SaaS screenshots on autopilot, powered by your AI IDE
launches.description: AutoKap turns screenshots into code. Ask Cursor or Claude Code to write a capture preset, run it locally, and get polished assets across every locale, theme, and viewport (and mockups!) — AI-verified, Studio-beautified, ready to ship. Stop hand-retaking screenshots.

launches.name: ThePickleHub
launches.tagline: Pickleball tournaments, livestream & community — Asia-first
launches.description: ThePickleHub is a bilingual (Vietnamese-English) pickleball platform built for Asia — the fastest-growing pickleball market. Features: tournament management (brackets, live scoring, team invites), livestream + replay (powered by Mux), daily news in VN/EN, community forum, and iOS/Android apps. Official digital coverage partner of PPA Tour Asia. Free for players, free tournament tools for organizers.

launches.name: Yolidue
launches.tagline: The AI coach that won't let indie hackers quit
launches.description: Most indie hackers don't fail from bad ideas. They quit too early. Yolidue is an AI coaching companion that keeps you shipping every day. 10 specialized coaches. 3-minute daily check-ins. Honest feedback, not cheerleading. $9.99 once. No subscription.

launches.name: King Louie
launches.tagline: BYOK Open Source Desktop AI agent that actually runs code
launches.description: I got tired of paying for five AI subscriptions and babysitting every step. King Louie connects to 13 providers: OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Groq, Ollama, xAI, DeepSeek and more. Bring your own keys, set routing rules so the right model gets picked automatically. ~20 built-in agent tools: Bash, file ops, git with safety guards, headless browser, background tasks, sub-agent spawning. Real workflows, not suggestions. MIT licensed. Cross-platform. Looking for contributors.

launches.name: SalesforceConnect.ai
launches.tagline: Ask your Salesforce org anything in plain English. Free
launches.description: SalesforceConnect.ai lets you query your Salesforce org in plain English. No SOQL, no report builder, no training needed. Connect your org in 2 min with OAuth. Ask "which deals close this month over $50K" or "which leads have no owner" and get instant answers from your real data. Free. Not a trial. No credit card. No per-user fee. Unlike Einstein or Agentforce, this costs nothing and needs zero setup. Built for sales teams, admins, and consultants tired of fighting the UI for a simple answer.

launches.name: SyncEthic AI
launches.tagline: Enterprise AI Governance
launches.description: SyncEthic is launching a secure AI governance platform that helps organizations control, monitor, and personalize enterprise AI assistants.

launches.name: PrimeSuite AI Prompt Packs
launches.tagline: 50 copy-paste AI prompts for every professional role
launches.description: PrimeSuite creates role-specific AI prompt packs for professionals generic AI content ignores. 21 roles covered: ISO 9001/14001/27001/45001 Auditors, Quality Manager, Production Manager, Operations Manager, B2B Sales, Marketing Manager, Supply Chain, and more. Each pack has 50 structured prompts covering the full role — with framework hints: MEDDIC, SPIN, 8D, OEE, PDCA, ISO clauses. Works with ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini. Instant PDF download.

launches.name: CVPage
launches.tagline: Your CV. One permanent link. Share it everywhere.
launches.description: Stop searching. Every time someone asks for your resume, you waste minutes searching your phone, finding the wrong version, or sending an outdated file. CVPage fixes this with one permanent link —cvpage.io/yourname Upload your CV once. Share the link everywhere: → LinkedIn bio → Email signature When someone opens your link, they see a clean professional profile and can download your CV instantly. ✦ Multiple CV versions ✦ See who viewed your profile ✦ QR code ✦ AI-powered CV review

launches.name: VoiceOI
launches.tagline: Voice agents without the LLM bill
launches.description: Most voice agents burn $0.05-$0.15/min on LLM APIs. At 500 concurrent bots, that’s $75k/month before infrastructure. VoiceOI replaces LLMs with a logic‑based drag‑drop builder. Same intelligent conversations, zero per‑token fees. 96% lower cost. • Native VICIdial & Asterisk • 15ms global script sync • You can connect any • $20-$35/bot/month - No Hidden charges Start saving in minutes.

launches.name: pentests.work
launches.tagline: AI-powered web app pentesting, human-verified, from $1,499
launches.description: pentests.work combines AI-driven testing with human expert verification to deliver web application penetration test reports in days, not weeks. Our AI goes beyond scanning — it performs authorization testing, permission escalation checks, and business logic abuse that traditionally required human pentesters. Every finding is verified by a certified expert. Zero false positives. Three plans from $1,499, no annual contracts.

launches.name: LinkForty
launches.tagline: Managed deeplinks with an AI copilot. Open-source engine.
launches.description: LinkForty is a modern deeplink + mobile attribution platform - a managed alternative to AppsFlyer and Branch. Cloud includes: → Real-time analytics with AI copilot that understands your links → Native SDKs for iOS, Android, React Native, Expo, Flutter → Team workspaces, custom domains, webhooks → Free tier + 14-day Pro trial, no card Under the hood, the redirect + tracking engine is open-source (AGPL-3.0). Self-host it if you need full data ownership.

launches.name: Localingos
launches.tagline: Translate your app into 56 languages with one CLI command
launches.description: Localingos is an AI-powered translation CLI for developers. Run `localingos sync` and your React, Next.js, Vue, or Angular app speaks 56 languages. Placeholder-safe, CI/CD ready, with an MCP server for AI coding agents. 5,000 words free forever.

launches.name: EPUB Compressor
launches.tagline: Shrink & reduce eBook size
launches.description: Compress EPUB files, save storage space, and optimize your ebook library in seconds. 100% on-device. No cloud, no accounts, no waiting.

launches.name: WinifyAI — AI RFP Response Software
launches.tagline: AI RFP response software for fast-moving teams
launches.description: Upload an RFP, extract the compliance matrix, and generate draft responses from past proposals. Winify AI helps small service teams respond faster and more consistently.

launches.name: Perplexity Health
launches.tagline: Ask health questions across your records, labs, wearables
launches.description: Perplexity Health connects your medical records, lab results, and wearable data so that AI can answer health questions using your actual history, not generic content written to rank. For Perplexity Pro and Max users in the US.

launches.name: LiveDemo
launches.tagline: Open-source Interactive product demos
launches.description: Product experience platform for product-led growth

launches.name: Magic Layers by Canva
launches.tagline: Turn any flat image into a fully editable design
launches.description: Magic Layers converts any flat PNG or JPG into editable layers inside Canva, live text, movable objects, and intact layout. For marketers, creators, and teams who iterate on AI-generated visuals.

launches.name: Pegkits
launches.tagline: Never lose your clipboard again
launches.description: Stop losing what you copied. Pegkits remembers everything text, links, images in one panel you open with Option+V. Built-in quick AI Actions translate, rewrite, or fix grammar in one click. Made for Mac. One-time price.

launches.name: Pagecorder
launches.tagline: Turn your web page into a hardware accelerated video via API
launches.description: Pagecorder is an API that records your web page as video, including screen and audio. It's performance-oriented and supports 60 FPS at 4K. Just add two JavaScript calls to your page to signal the start and end of the recording, post the link (or a self-contained ZIP bundle) to the API, and voilà! Use it for social video from HTML templates, animated dashboards, product demos, or CSS/Canvas/WebGL motion graphics. Recordings are billed per second. Failed jobs are free.

launches.name: OnTheMap
launches.tagline: The global map for builders, founders, and visionaries
launches.description: OnTheMap makes founder discovery visual and alive: instead of another static directory, it maps builders and visionaries on a live global globe, adds Stripe-powered recurring revenue signals, and ranks momentum by country so you can instantly see who’s building, where it’s happening, and which ecosystems are rising.

launches.name: Magic Lane
launches.tagline: Sovereign navigation infrastructure for Europe
launches.description: Magic Lane provides mission-critical routing and spatial intelligence with 100% EU data residency. Serves micromobility, fleet, automotive, emergency, and on-demand rides with privacy-first, offline-capable tech.

launches.name: STRIKE
launches.tagline: The habit app that doesn't forgive you
launches.description: Most habit apps let you lie to yourself. Miss a day? Mark it done. Streak saved. STRIKE removes that escape hatch. When your alarm fires, you get one window to validate. Miss it — streak resets to zero. No editing history. No second chances. 3 modes: Builder (build good habits), Killer (break bad ones), Pomodoro (deep work). Real alarms. Not notifications. Iron discipline.

launches.name: TMaily
launches.tagline: Free disposable email that actually arrives in real time
launches.description: TMaily gives you a free, disposable email address the moment you open the page. No signup, no tracking. Emails arrive instantly — not after a refresh. Supports attachments, custom usernames, and multiple domains. Everything auto-deletes in 24 hours. Your privacy, simplified.

launches.name: VoiceHotKey Speech to Text
launches.tagline: Your voice is a keyboard. VoiceHotKey – Dictate Instantly!
launches.description: VoiceHotKey is voice transcription application that transforms your spoken words into text with just a hotkey press. Dictation that works in any application in any language. Use your voice as a keyboard with VoiceKey

launches.name: Saasybill
launches.tagline: Subscription billing automation built for Xero
launches.description: Most billing tools want to own your invoicing. Saasybill doesn't. Every invoice is created directly inside Xero, so your accounting stays intact, your accountant doesn't need to change anything, and you're not paying a percentage of your revenue to process bank transfers. Set up your plans, attach subscriptions to customers, and billing runs automatically at renewal. Flat subscription pricing, no transaction fees.

launches.name: Math Alarm - Solve to Wake Up
launches.tagline: No math, no snooze — wake up your brain every morning!
launches.description: Math Alarm forces you to actually wake up — not just tap dismiss. When your alarm rings, it won't stop until you solve a math problem. Choose your difficulty: easy arithmetic or harder challenges for a real brain workout. No snooze. No shortcuts. Just a simple, effective way to start your day alert and focused. Perfect for heavy sleepers who keep dismissing alarms without even realizing it.

launches.name: Mosai Scanner
launches.tagline: Find the security holes AI vibe coding tools leave behind.
launches.description: Tools like Cursor and Lovable build the "Happy Path" beautifully, but the infrastructure underneath is often hollow. I audited 279 AI-built SaaS products and found 64% had critical leaks (like Stripe keys in public JS bundles). Mosai Scanner runs 78 passive checks in 60s to show the visible and hidden vulnerabilities your deploy is screaming to the internet. Stop delegating your valuation to probabilistic models. See what attackers see when they press F12.

launches.name: Yard Desq
launches.tagline: Client management for solo landscapers, built for the truck.
launches.description: After watching a landscaper stand in blistering heat searching for a client's number on a piece of paper, I built a solution. First in my head on the flight home. Yard Desq gives solo landscapers clean client records, a daily job list, one-tap payment requests via Venmo/Zelle/Cash App, and seasonal hold management - all in their pocket before they pull up to the property. $9.99/mo. Try free for 30 days. Switch to native Spanish in one tap. Not Google Translate. Actually translated.

launches.name: OTWarden
launches.tagline: ICS/OT vulnerability alerts before attackers exploit them
launches.description: OTWarden monitors CISA, Siemens ProductCERT, Rockwell, and BSI advisories and emails you within 2 hours when a vulnerability affects your ICS/OT systems. Built for OT security engineers, SOC teams, and MSSPs who can't afford to miss a critical advisory. Set up a watchlist by vendor, product, or sector. Filter by CVSS severity. Track your assets and see exactly which ones are at risk. No more manually checking CISA every morning. Plans from £29/month with a 14-day free trial.

launches.name: Secure Wi-Fi
launches.tagline: Find hidden devices & secure your Wi-Fi instantly.
launches.description: Worried about who is on your Wi-Fi? Secure Wi-Fi Network Scanner lets you instantly discover all connected devices, detect potential vulnerabilities, and ensure your network is safe. Perfect for home use and public hotspots.

launches.name: CashRunway
launches.tagline: Know exactly how long your cash will last.
launches.description: CashRunway connects to your Xero account and turns your financials into a clear cash flow timeline. See your runway at a glance, spot shortfalls before they hit, and share clean reports with clients or stakeholders. Built for bookkeepers and small business owners who need answers fast, not another spreadsheet. Free to connect. No manual data entry.
